attractions.name: Kek Lok Si Temple
attractions.description: One of Southeast Asia's largest Buddhist temple complexes, serene blend of pagodas, prayer halls, and hilltop views with towering statue of Goddess of Mercy
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Penang Hill Funicular
attractions.description: Scenic funicular railway ascent through lush rainforest to Penang Hill with cooler air and panoramic views
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Tow Boo Kong Temple
attractions.description: One of the most beautiful Nine Emperor Gods temples in Malaysia, richly decorated with intricate carvings, vibrant colours, and deeply spiritual atmosphere
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Penang Bird Park
attractions.description: Malaysia's first and largest bird park, home to hundreds of species across walk-in aviaries with colourful parrots, flamingos, hornbills
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf

attractions.name: Design Village Outlet Mall
attractions.description: Open-air outlet mall with international brands, cafés, and relaxed promenades
source_files: Singapore and Malaysia/Shubhi and Rochak_Malaysia_All Inclusive Guide.pdf
